question: What is the id of the pet owned by the student whose last name is 'Smith'?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.petid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid WHERE T1.Lname  =  'Smith'
gold_sql_original: SELECT T2.petid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid WHERE T1.Lname  =  'Smith'
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT T2.petid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid WHERE T1.Lname  =  'Smith'
agent_sql: SELECT has_pet.PetID AS PetID FROM student JOIN has_pet ON student.StuID = has_pet.StuID WHERE student.LName = 'Smith' LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT has_pet.PetID AS PetID FROM student JOIN has_pet ON student.StuID = has_pet.StuID WHERE student.LName = 'Smith' LIMIT 100
agent_answer: The pet ID owned by the student whose last name is 'Smith' is 2001.
